login.title: Developer Portal
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your API credentials
login.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Get your API credentials to start integrating
register.name: Full name
register.password_hint: Min. 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol
register.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
register.success_body: Save your credentials below — the secret will not be shown again.

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.name_max: Name must be at most 100 characters.
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.password_max: Password must be at most 128 characters.
validation.password_uppercase: Add at least one uppercase letter.
validation.password_lowercase: Add at least one lowercase letter.
validation.password_special: Add at least one special character (e.g. !@#$%).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.quickstart_body: Use your Client ID and Client Secret to obtain a Bearer token:

keys.title: API Keys
keys.rotate_body: Generate a new client secret. Your current secret will stop working immediately.
keys.rotate_confirm: Are you sure? Your current secret will be invalidated.

docs.title: API Reference
docs.auth_body: All API calls require a Bearer token obtained via the client_credentials flow.
docs.tokens_body: Deploy and operate ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 contracts.
docs.users_body: Create user accounts and manage FIAT/token balances.
